Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations 68 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Dolphin Progress Release 2603 277 upvotes, 46 comments
  3. The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects 168 upvotes, 33 comments
  4. Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, 4 execs in alleged $1.4B tax evasion 221 upvotes, 57 comments
  5. Shall I implement it? No 200 upvotes, 53 comments
  6. DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration 45 upvotes, 9 comments
  7. Reversing memory loss via gut-brain communication 153 upvotes, 46 comments
  8. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 896 upvotes, 354 comments
  9. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 206 upvotes, 71 comments
  10. Show HN: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once 60 upvotes, 18 comments
  11. Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust 97 upvotes, 35 comments
  12. Forcing Flash Attention onto a TPU and Learning the Hard Way 14 upvotes, 2 comments
  13. The Cost of Indirection in Rust 69 upvotes, 31 comments
  14. Innocent woman jailed after being misidentified using AI facial recognition 150 upvotes, 83 comments
  15. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources 13 upvotes, 3 comments
  16. NASA's DART spacecraft changed an asteroid's orbit around the sun 90 upvotes, 52 comments
  17. Show HN: Rudel – Claude Code Session Analytics 118 upvotes, 72 comments
  18. Runners who churn butter on their runs 43 upvotes, 21 comments
  19. Full Spectrum and Infrared Photography 40 upvotes, 21 comments
  20. Launch HN: IonRouter (YC W26) – High-throughput, low-cost inference 28 upvotes, 13 comments
  21. Should hack-back be legal? 11 upvotes, 3 comments
  22. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 122 upvotes, 88 comments
  23. Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework 118 upvotes, 85 comments
  24. Big data on the cheapest MacBook 268 upvotes, 240 comments
  25. ATMs didn't kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 255 upvotes, 308 comments
  26. Are LLM merge rates not getting better? 85 upvotes, 94 comments
  27. Bringing Chrome to ARM64 Linux Devices 24 upvotes, 27 comments
  28. US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says 162 upvotes, 301 comments
  29. The Road Not Taken: A World Where IPv4 Evolved 38 upvotes, 57 comments
  30. Converge (YC S23) Is Hiring a Founding Platform Engineer (NYC, Onsite) 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:00am, 13 March 2026. Source here.
